page_header.label: ROADMAP
page_header.title: Where We're Going
page_header.description: Our public development roadmap. Track our progress from MVP to production-ready protocol.

sections.label: DEVELOPMENT TIMELINE
sections.title: Public Roadmap
sections.subtitle: Transparent development progress from initial concept to production mainnet deployment.

items.title: Stealth Address Cryptography
items.description: ECDH key derivation for generating unique one-time addresses

items.title: Payment Escrow Program
items.description: Anchor smart contracts for time-locked escrows with claim verification

items.title: Pay Web App
items.description: Complete web interface for creating and claiming payment links

items.title: Gas Relayer
items.description: Sponsored transaction service for gasless claim experience

items.title: REST API
items.description: HTTP endpoints for payment management and metadata storage

items.title: Basic Telegram Bot
items.description: /send and /request commands for creating payment links in chat

items.title: Shielded Pool (ZK Proofs)
items.description: Groth16 zero-knowledge proof deposits and withdrawals with on-chain verification

items.title: Tor Hidden Service
items.description: RPC privacy through Tor .onion routing

items.title: Nym Mixnet Integration
items.description: Browser-level network privacy via Nym mixnet transport

items.title: Timing Defense System
items.description: 6-hour soak time, Poisson-distributed batch processing, and automated protocol decoys

items.title: Contacts & Address Book
items.description: Save frequently used addresses and manage payment recipients

items.title: Payment History Dashboard
items.description: Track sent and received payments with detailed transaction history

items.title: Batch Payments
items.description: Send payments to multiple recipients in one transaction

items.title: Developer SDK & Widget
items.description: TypeScript SDK and embeddable React components for developers

items.title: Telegram Bot Enhancement
items.description: Advanced features, inline queries, and group payment management

items.title: Conditional Escrow (Milestones)
items.description: Multi-stage payments with milestone-based releases

items.title: Multi-Sig Approval Flows
items.description: M-of-N signature requirements for high-value transfers

items.title: Formal Security Audit
items.description: Professional security assessment by tier-1 audit firms

items.title: Mainnet Launch
items.description: Production deployment on Solana mainnet after audit completion

items.title: Token-2022 Confidential Transfers
items.description: Integration with Solana's native confidential transfer extension

items.title: Mobile App
items.description: Native iOS and Android apps with camera QR scanning

sections.label: STAY UPDATED
sections.title: Real-Time Progress
sections.subtitle: This roadmap is updated regularly as we complete milestones and adjust priorities based on community feedback and technical discoveries.

items.title: GitHub
items.description: Follow development progress, issues, and pull requests in real-time on our public repositories.

items.title: Telegram
items.description: Join our community chat for discussions, announcements, and direct feedback on roadmap priorities.

items.title: Twitter
items.description: Get milestone updates, feature announcements, and behind-the-scenes development insights.

sections.title: Shape our roadmap
sections.description: Community feedback drives our development priorities. Share your ideas, vote on features, and help us build the future of confidential payments.
